title: Phantom Gear
description: This mod gives a new use to phantom membranes being making armor invisible.
body:
Invisibility is flawed.
When an entity is affected with invisibility their armor doesn't get affected. You can't have pure invisibility without protection and that is what this mod aims to fix.

This mod adds the ability to combine phantom membranes with an armor piece of your choise **(Including Elytra)** with quartz (temporary), an armor piece and a phantom membrane![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27422ff9fc6b353c475912b3e3d5b6a7d309a6cd_0.webp)
